stories.topic: Izraelské stíhačky zůstaly na ranveji. Írán diktuje pravidla
stories.synthesis: Izraelské stíhačky zůstaly na ranveji. Írán diktuje pravidla

sources.headline: Izraelské stíhačky zůstaly na ranveji. Írán diktuje pravidla a vodí si Trumpa
sources.summary: Donald Trump se kasal, že íránská vojenská síla je po úspěšných útocích v troskách. Teherán se ale oklepal a pokouší se diktovat pravidla v regionu. Mistrně využívá neshod ve vysněných výsledcích spol

sources.headline: ONLINE: Nový balík proruských sankcí. Evropská komise je namířila proti energetice a obchodu
sources.summary: Evropská komise navrhla nový, 21. balík sankcí proti Rusku, který se zaměřuje na energetiku, obchod – včetně zákazu dovozu ruských a běloruských ryb, ruské banky i takzvanou stínovou flotilu. Oznámila

sources.headline: Ať pocítí, co je válka. Drony budou nadále létat nad Moskvou a Petrohradem, řekl Zelenskyj
sources.summary: Ukrajina bude nadále prostřednictvím dronů útočit na Moskvu a Petrohrad, řekl v rozhovoru pro list The Guardian ukrajinský prezident Volodymyr Zelenskyj. Jen ať obyvatelé těchto měst „pocítí, co to je

sources.headline: Peking znervózňuje vztah Kima a Putina. Čínský prezident se v KLDR pokoušel ‚vrátit do rovnice‘
sources.summary: Na příjezd čínského prezidenta Si Ťin-pchinga čekaly na náměstí v severokorejském Pchjongjangu tisíce lidí. Hrála armádní kapela, děti poskakovaly radostí a lidé mávali vlajkami obou zemí. Uvítání čín

sources.headline: Russia's fuel crisis intensifies as Ukraine steps up strikes on occupied territories
sources.summary: Kyiv has made it difficult for Moscow to provide military and civilian supplies to the territories it occupies.

sources.headline: As Crimea faces near total cut-off, panicked Russian tourists cancel plans (Ukraine Battlefield update, Day 1,565)
sources.summary: Ukrainian drone strikes choking off fuel, bridges, and trains to Crimea, prompting pro-war Russian bloggers to turn on Putin, while tourists rush to cancel summer holidays on the peninsula.

sources.headline: Zelensky's close European allies set out five conditions for peace talks
sources.summary: The Ukrainian president's meeting with his staunchest European allies came as US President Donald Trump's focus shifts to the war with Iran.

sources.headline: Third term for Pashinyan anchors Armenia’s pro‑EU course, despite Moscow’s interference
sources.summary: Incumbent PM Nikol Pashinyan built a campaign on stability and peace in the region. His win is a blow to Russian influence in the South Caucasus, but what happens next?

sources.headline: Armenia's pro-West government wins election despite Russian pressure
sources.summary: Prime Minister Nikol Pashinyan's Civil Contract Party secures nearly 50% of the vote, comfortably beating the other contenders.

sources.headline: Pro-western but populist: how Nikol Pashinyan retained power in Armenia
sources.summary: PM secured re-election despite devastating military defeat to Azerbaijan and political and economic pressure from Moscow

sources.headline: Armenia’s pro-Europe party wins election and cements shift away from Russia
sources.summary: Result strengthens PM Nikol Pashinyan’s drive for deeper integration with Europe despite warnings from Moscow

sources.headline: Armenia votes as Russia piles pressure on pro-West government
sources.summary: Incumbent Prime Minister Nikol Pashinyan is seeking a third term despite falling domestic support.

sources.headline: ‘It’s time to move forward’: Armenians vote in election closely watched by Russia and EU
sources.summary: Voters to choose between pro-Russian opposition and incumbent Nikol Pashinyan, who is more closely aligned with the west

sources.headline: Bulgaria halts Ukraine military aid
sources.summary: Prime Minister Rumen Radev believes the Ukrainian cause is "doomed."

sources.headline: Steve Rosenberg: Russia's economic forum overshadowed by drone attacks on St Petersburg
sources.summary: The BBC's Russia editor saw Putin's flagship economic event overshadowed by Ukrainian drones attacks.

sources.headline: Russian drone hits building storing spent nuclear fuel near Chornobyl
sources.summary: Attack was ‘extremely vile’ and deliberate, says Ukraine’s president Volodymyr Zelenskyy

sources.headline: European Commission proposes EU entry ban for all who fought against Ukraine
sources.summary: The European Commission has proposed an addition to the European Union's upcoming 21st sanctions package against Russia, namely an entry ban on all individuals who have fought on Russia's side in the

sources.headline: European Commission unveils 21st EU sanctions package against Russia: what it includes
sources.summary: The European Commission's proposed 21st package of EU sanctions against Russia, unveiled on 9 June, focuses on energy, financial services and cryptocurrencies, trade and fishery.

sources.headline: Von der Leyen to present 21st EU sanctions package against Russia on 9 June
sources.summary: European Commission President Ursula von der Leyen will present the new EU package of sanctions against Russia on Tuesday 9 June.

sources.headline: Zelenskyy insists Europe must take part in ceasefire negotiations
sources.summary: President Volodymyr Zelenskyy has said that Europe must take part in any potential leaders' talks on a ceasefire because Russia's war against Ukraine affects the security of the entire continent.

sources.headline: Zelenskyy: strong EU political decisions expected this summer
sources.summary: President Volodymyr Zelenskyy has announced important European Union political decisions regarding Ukraine's future membership.

sources.headline: Number of people injured in Russian strike on Zaporizhzhia rises to 32, two killed – photos
sources.summary: The number of people injured in a Russian drone attack on a residential district of Zaporizhzhia on 8 June has risen to 32, including five children, two people were killed.

sources.headline: Xi Jinping arrives in Pyongyang on trip to revitalise China-North Korea ties
sources.summary: Kim Jong-un welcomes Chinese leader on visit to renew relations strained amid Pyongyang’s closeness with Russia

sources.headline: Russia has modified Kalibr missiles used in attacks on Ukraine, Kyiv says – photos
sources.summary: Russia has begun equipping Kalibr cruise missiles with cluster warheads and has reverted to using imported electronics after attempting to switch to domestic components, according to a Ukrainian Defen

sources.headline: Ten Russians identified over drone "safari" attacks on civilians in Kherson Oblast – video
sources.summary: The Security Service of Ukraine's counterintelligence unit has gathered evidence against ten Russian servicemen accused of deliberately using attack drones against civilians in Kherson. Prosecutors ha

sources.headline: Russian overnight strike targets business centre and civilian infrastructure in Kharkiv
sources.summary: Read more about the aftermath of the Russian large-scale attack on Kharkiv in the Ekonomichna Pravda report.

sources.headline: Trump a Putin zatiaľ nebudú rokovať. Kremeľ priznáva pozastavené americké sprostredkovanie vo vojne na Ukrajine
sources.summary: Trump a Putin zatiaľ neplánujú telefonát, no americkí vyjednávači sú v kontakte s Moskvou aj Kyjevom. Ich pozastavená misia môže ešte zohrať významnú rolu.

sources.headline: ONLINE: Trump a Putin nateraz bez telefonátu: Kremeľ hlási ticho na najvyššej úrovni
sources.summary: Vojna na Ukrajine trvá už 1 566 dní.

sources.headline: Vývoj bojov (1566. deň): Rusi zastavili prepravu vojenského materiálu po hlavnej ceste na Krym, tvrdí Maďar
sources.summary: Ukrajinský veliteľ píše, že Rusi zakázali prepravu vojenského materiálu po kľúčovej ceste na Krym. Ukrajinci druhýkrát za tri dni zasiahli Čongarský most, ktorý spája južnú Ukrajinu s Krymom. Geografi

sources.headline: Izraelské nálety zasiahli antický Tyros. Trosky padali na poklady UNESCO, Libanon hovorí o barbarstve
sources.summary: Izraelská armáda v Libanone pri útokoch vážne poškodila antickú lokalitu Tyros

sources.headline: Kamera zachytila momenty hrôzy: Ruský dron zasiahol zastávku plnú ľudí
sources.summary: Ruská armáda cielila na civilnú infraštruktúru v čase, keď sa ľudia vracali z práce domov.

sources.headline: Ďalší ruský generál na odstrel? Pri Moskve explodovalo auto, zomrel vodič
sources.summary: Nálož umiestnená pod sedadlom mala silu zodpovedajúcu 300 až 400 gramom trinitrotoluénu.

sources.headline: Middle East crisis live: Lebanese officials says Israeli strikes on Tyre have killed at least eight people
sources.summary: IDF earlier issued urgent evacuation order in Lebanon’s fifth biggest city

sources.headline: 300 migrants bound for UK kidnapped and threatened with kidney removal
sources.summary: The Iraqi Kurds were captured by a militia who demanded a ransom of $5,000 (£3,700) per person.

sources.headline: Lebanon Is Teetering at the Abyss of a New Civil War
sources.summary: A ceasefire agreement with Israel requiring the government to dismantle Hezbollah reignites sectarian tensions.

sources.headline: Apple unveils ‘Siri AI’ in challenge to rival chatbots
sources.summary: Silicon Valley giant promises user privacy as it makes long-delayed overhaul of voice assistant

sources.headline: Iran’s Attack on Israel Reveals New and Aggressive Regional Ambitions
sources.summary: The move to protect Hezbollah shows an appetite for risk that didn’t exist before the war.

sources.headline: Stock market jitters remain amid tech fears and renewed Middle East attacks
sources.summary: Markets in Asia are hit by a tech sell-off, and oil is volatile as Iran and Israel launch attacks on each other.

sources.headline: Trump Struggled to Rein In Netanyahu’s Strikes on Iran
sources.summary: A climbdown in a phone call with the Israeli leader shows the president’s diminishing control over fighting that threatens his effort to reach a peace deal with Tehran.

sources.headline: Iran and Israel Halt Exchanges of Fire
sources.summary: In a tumultuous resumption of violence, Iran had fired several volleys of attacks, while Israel’s targets included a major Iranian petrochemical facility.

sources.headline: Iran's strike on Israel suggests the regime's sense of resilience is growing
sources.summary: Iran's decision to risk jeopardising peace talks may reflect how its leaders view their current position, writes BBC Persian editor Amir Azimi.

sources.headline: The 'SaaSpocalypse' is over, says private equity giant Thoma Bravo. Here's why it sees an AI boom for software
sources.summary: Thoma Bravo founder Orlando Bravo says AI offers an "enormous tailwind" for software companies.

sources.headline: 51% of U.S. adults say the American Dream is out of reach for most people right now: CNBC survey
sources.summary: In an exclusive CNBC survey, 81% of respondents said the cost of living is their biggest financial hurdle to achieving the American Dream.

sources.headline: Eurokomisia navrhla 21. balík sankcií proti Rusku, zameriava sa na banky aj energetiku
sources.summary: Európska komisia navrhla nový, 21. balík sankcií proti Rusku, ktorý sa zameriava na energetiku, obchod - vrátane zákazu dovozu ruských a bieloruských rýb, ruskej banky aj takzvanú tieňovú flotilu. Ozn

sources.headline: Pentagon expands list of China military-linked firms to include Alibaba, Baidu in fresh blow to diplomatic thaw
sources.summary: The Pentagon briefly posted a similar expanded list in February, then withdrew it without explanation before Trump's China trip.

sources.headline: 2 Relationship Skills That Every Partner Should Learn
sources.summary: Two skills that can take a relationship from surving to thriving.

stories.synthesis: Mozart’s genius lay in writing music of such power that he could draw his audience into morally wrenching predicaments - by Dorian Bandy Read on Aeon
stories.hook: A surprising find from outside the usual news stream.

stories.synthesis: "Inside the tiny community of English master thatchers, a fight is unfolding over a tradition that may not survive."
